dromedary.description: A hardy animal, suitable for barren conditions.

dromedary_young.description: A hardy animal, suitable for barren conditions. This one is still small!

wild_dromedary.description: A wild, hardy animal, suitable for barren conditions.

wild_dromedary_young.description: A wild, hardy animal, suitable for barren conditions. This one is still small!.

coffee_basket.description: Fairly bitter tasting beans, roast them and make a beverage.

coffee_serving.description: Chewy energy providing beans, suitable when roasted and used in a hot beverage.

dromedary_milk.description: Warm and smooth, straight from a healthy dromedary!

dromedary_milk_serving.description: Warm and smooth, straight from a healthy Dromedary!

coffee_desert.description: Hot, thick and energizing, served in decorative cups.

coffee_desert_serving.description: Hot, thick and energizing, served in decorative cups.

coffee_iconic.description: Hot, thick and energizing, served in decorative cups.

coffee_plant_bud.description: It's almost there! Look, it has buds!

coffee_plant_seed_ghost.description: Can be planted to grow a bush of bitter coffee beans.

coffee_plant_sprout.description: Just needs some time and care.

decorative_coffeepot_ghost.description: Used for the storage and pouring of coffee, this pot is currently empty.

dromedary_feed_recipe.flavor: "Trust in Cid, but tie up your Camel." -Popular desert proverb

coffee_recipe.description: A zesty and hot beverage very appreciated by many! Provides a bonus to hearthlings.
coffee_recipe.flavor: Prepared coffee must be placed somewhere in order to be consumed

coffee_plant_transmute_recipe.flavor: Only a skilled hand can harvest the weaker seeds, but the fruit is lost in the process.

decorative_coffeepot_recipe.flavor: 'A finely crafted serving vessel for the beverage to start your day.'

pasture.dromedary_pasture_description: Dromedary produce milk, a nourishing drink and also wool used by the weaver. Slaughtering Dromedary will produce meat, a raw cooking ingredient.

coffee_energy.description:
Woo, caffeine rush! Diligence is increased, Speed is slightly increased. The need for sleep is slightly decreased.
  • Crafting is slightly faster
